zh.Benenden, Kent, England: 英國英格蘭肯特貝嫩登
zh.Rolvenden, Kent, England: 英國英格蘭肯特洛爾文登
zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas Fowle於大約1512年出生在英國英格蘭肯特貝嫩登時，他的父親Richard Fowle or Fowler38歲，母親Mrs Richard Fowle22歲。他於大約1534年與Mrs Nicholas Foule在英國英格蘭肯特洛爾文登結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特洛爾文登。

zh-hans.Benenden, Kent, England: 英国英格兰肯特貝嫩登
zh-hans.Rolvenden, Kent, England: 英国英格兰肯特洛爾文登
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas Fowle于大约1512年出生在英国英格兰肯特貝嫩登时，他的父亲Richard Fowle or Fowler38岁，母亲Mrs Richard Fowle22岁。他于大约1534年与Mrs Nicholas Foule在英国英格兰肯特洛爾文登结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他埋葬在英国英格兰肯特洛爾文登。

nameMeanings.name: Fowle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Kent): patronymic from the Middle English personal name Foghel, Fughel (Old English Fugel, Fugol, from Old English fugol ‘fowl, bird’). Alternatively, a nickname from Middle English fughel, foghel, foul ‘fowl, bird’, either with reference to physical appearance, size, or behavior, or possibly also a nickname for someone who kept or sold birds.

variants.name: Faul
meanings: Irish or Scottish: shortened form of McFaul , from Scottish Gaelic Mac Phàil or Irish Mac Phóil, ‘son of Paul’. See McFall , McPhaul , and McPhail .

South German: nickname for a weakling, from Middle High German vūl, voul ‘frail, decayed, foul, weak’. Later the term took on the meaning ‘lazy’ and in some cases the surname may have arisen as a nickname from this sense.

variants.name: Felton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places so called. Most of them, including those in Herefordshire, Shropshire, and Somerset (Winford), are named from Old English feld ‘pasture, open country’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. Another place of the same name in Somerset, also known as Whitchurch, has as its first element Old English filethe ‘hay’. Felton Hill in Northumberland is named with the Old English personal name Fygla (a derivative of fugol ‘bird’; compare Fowle ).

variants.name: Fewell
meanings: English: variant of Fowle , from the Middle English personal name Foghel, Fughel (Old English Fugel, Fugol, from Old English fugol ‘fowl, bird’). Or a nickname either with reference to physical appearance, size, or behavior, or possibly also a nickname for someone who kept or sold birds.

variants.name: Fuell
meanings: German (Füll; mainly Hesse and Baden-Württemberg): perhaps a shortened form of a surname beginning with Füll-. Compare Full .

variants.name: Fowles
meanings: English: variant of Fowle , with post-medieval excrescent -s.
Scottish: variant of Foulis, a habitational name from Fowlis in Angus, or, less commonly, from Fowlis Wester in Strathearn, Perthshire.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas Fowle was born about 1512, in Benenden, Kent, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Fowle or Fowler, was 38 and his mother, Mrs Richard Fowle, was 22. He married Mrs Nicholas Foule about 1534, in Rolvenden, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He was buried in Rolvenden, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas Fowle est né environ 1512, à Benenden, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Fowle or Fowler, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Mrs Richard Fowle, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Mrs Nicholas Foule environ 1534, à Rolvenden, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Ilenterré à Rolvenden, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas Fowle um 1512 in Benenden, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Fowle or Fowler 38 und seine Mutter Mrs Richard Fowle 22. Er hat um 1534 in Rolvenden, Kent, England, United Kingdom Mrs Nicholas Foule geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er wurde in Rolvenden, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Fowle è nato il circa 1512 nel Benenden, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard Fowle or Fowler, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Mrs Richard Fowle, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Mrs Nicholas Foule circa 1534, nel Rolvenden, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Fu sepolto a Rolvenden, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas Fowleが約1512年にイギリスイギリスケントベンエンデンで生まれた時，父Richard Fowle or Fowlerは38歳，母Mrs Richard Fowleは22歳であった。約1534年にイギリスイギリスケントロルベンデンでMrs Nicholas Fouleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼はイギリスイギリスケントロルベンデンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas Fowle(이)가 대략 1512년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 베니든에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Fowle or Fowler(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs Richard Fowle(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1534년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 롤븐든에서 Mrs Nicholas Foule(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 롤븐든에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Fowle nasceu aproximadamente 1512, em Benenden, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Fowle or Fowler, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Mrs Richard Fowle, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs Nicholas Foule aproximadamente 1534, em Rolvenden, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele foi sepultado em Rolvenden, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas Fowle родился около 1512 г. в местности биненден, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard Fowle or Fowler было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Richard Fowle, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Nicholas Foule около 1534 г. в местности ролвенден, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он был похоронен в местности ролвенден, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas Fowle nació aproximadamente 1512, en Benenden, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard Fowle or Fowler, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Mrs Richard Fowle, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Mrs Nicholas Foule aproximadamente 1534, en Rolvenden, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Fue sepultado en Rolvenden, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
